evals.prompt: I want to upgrade my MatrixScan Batch web app from SDK v7 to v8. Here's the file that initializes the SDK: scanner-v7.ts.
evals.expected_output: The skill detects v7 from the package, applies the v7→v8 migration: replaces configure()+DataCaptureContext.create() with DataCaptureContext.forLicenseKey(), removes the configure import. No BarcodeBatch-specific class renames are needed for v7→v8.

assertions.text: DataCaptureContext.forLicenseKey( is present in the migrated code
configure( import or call is removed
libraryLocation and moduleLoaders are present inside DataCaptureContext.forLicenseKey(
The migration guide links for 7→8 are mentioned (docs.scandit.com/sdks/web/migrate-7-to-8)

evals.prompt: I need to migrate my MatrixScan web app from v6 to v7. The app uses BarcodeTracking. Here's the main scanner file.
evals.expected_output: The skill applies the v6→v7 migration: renames BarcodeTracking* classes to BarcodeBatch*, updates package names from scandit-web-datacapture-* to @scandit/web-datacapture-*, and updates libraryLocation from build/engine to sdc-lib.

assertions.text: BarcodeTrackingBasicOverlay or BarcodeTrackingAdvancedOverlay is renamed to the BarcodeBatch equivalent (semantic)
Package names updated from scandit-web-datacapture-* to @scandit/web-datacapture-* (semantic)
libraryLocation path updated from build/engine to sdc-lib or equivalent (semantic)
The migration guide link for 6→7 is mentioned (docs.scandit.com/sdks/web/migrate-6-to-7)
